about_p1: Student of Information Technologies at the University of Algarve, focused on software development, networking and cybersecurity. My tech stack includes Python, Java, JavaScript and React, combined with hands-on knowledge in Linux and network infrastructure.
about_p2: Alongside my academic path, I serve in the GNR (National Republican Guard) — an experience that shaped my discipline, teamwork and ability to perform under pressure.
about_p3: I have specialized training in offensive cybersecurity, incident response and cyber resilience. I value efficiency, continuous improvement and building solutions that work even when the environment doesn't cooperate.

exp_gnr_desc: Operational patrol service, public assistance — developing teamwork, stress management, conflict mediation, and adaptability to dynamic and unpredictable environments.
